---
title: The Ones Who Walk Away from Omelas
author: Ursula K. Le Guin
date: '2025-10-31'
categories:
- Fiction
- Book
image: cover.jpg
subtitle: ★★★ | A Story
rating: 3
body-class: project-detail-view
include-before-body:
  text: '<div style=''margin-top: 50px;''></div>'
---


<style>
  #quarto-margin-sidebar {
    padding-top: 50px;
  }
</style>

# The Ones Who Walk Away from Omelas
Interesting concept but really short book

## Reading Journey

- 2025-10-31: Finished
